title: cirsium wheeleri
intro: Cirsium wheeleri, also known as Wheeler's thistle, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This prickly perennial plant has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cirsium wheeleri are said to include relief from pain and inflammation, as well as potential antimicrobial effects. Herbal preparations of Cirsium wheeleri can be made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea or by drying and powderizing the plant for use in capsules or tinctures.
